title: Lead the World in AI
description: lead the world in ai President Trump has reasserted American leadership in technology by accelerating innovation in artificial intelligence, digital assets, and advanced manufacturing while cutting red tape that stifles growth. This year, his administration launched a national AI strategy, expanded federal support for emerging technologies, and prioritized secure, domestic supply chains to outpace global […]
text:
President Trump has reasserted American leadership in technology by accelerating innovation in artificial intelligence, digital assets, and advanced manufacturing while cutting red tape that stifles growth. This year, his administration launched a national AI strategy, expanded federal support for emerging technologies, and prioritized secure, domestic supply chains to outpace global competitors. These actions are fueling a new era of American ingenuity, strengthening economic and national security at the same time.
By empowering the private sector and protecting American innovation from foreign exploitation, the administration is ensuring technological leadership remains firmly in U.S. hands. President Trump’s approach promotes competition, rewards entrepreneurship, and positions the United States to lead the world in the industries that will define the future.
